title: No trampling on farmland
description: Prevents farmland from being trampled by players and mobs. Lightweight, no dependencies.
body:
# No Trampling on Farmland

A lightweight mod that prevents farmland from being trampled and degraded, designed to work with minimal performance impact and without introducing dependencies or extra commands.

## Usage
Control trampling behavior using vanilla game rules:

- **`players_are_forbidden_to_trample_on_farmland`** - Prevent players from trampling farmland
- **`no_biological_trampling_on_farmland`** - Prevent other entities/mobs from trampling farmland

Some settings can be modified in the configuration file

In Forge/NeoForge, the file name can use this command to show
```
/config showfile no_trampling_on_farmland COMMON
```

In Fabric, the file name is `NoTramplingOnFarmland.toml`
